hero.title: Board Game
hero.subtitle: Hundreds of games, experienced staff, and a fun atmosphere await you.

about.title: Welcome to
about.description: Since 2017, we have been keeping board game culture alive in Ankara, presenting hundreds of games with our experienced team. We have become a home for game lovers of all ages and experience levels.

items.title: Extensive Game Library
items.desc: With over 500 board games, we offer options for every taste — from strategy to cooperative, family games to party games.

items.title: Experienced Game Guides
items.desc: Our expert team is ready to teach you any game and make your gaming experience as enjoyable as possible.

items.title: Comfortable Environment
items.desc: With wide tables, comfortable chairs and special lighting, you will feel at home in our venue designed for hours of play.

items.title: Delicious Menu
items.desc: From coffee to snacks, our rich menu completes your gaming table experience.

items.title: Events and Tournaments
items.desc: Become part of our gaming community with regularly organized tournaments and special events.

items.title: Group Reservations
items.desc: Birthday, bachelor party, corporate event — you can make special table reservations for all your special days.

location.title: We Know
location.address: Neorama Business Center, Beştepe Mah. Yaşam Cd, Adalet Street No:4/B, 06510 Çankaya/Ankara
